title: Emilio
html:
Emilio

Yahir's younger brother — nicknamed "Yermy" or "Yermers" in the early notes — and the most-protected node in the family graph. He is the person Yahir is building the family knowledge transfer for. The earliest evidence of this is in 2019 11 13 coding zeal, where 16-year-old Yahir writes "Talk to Mom and Dad about the difficult topics, so that down the road Emilio and I will know (include yermers)" — designating himself, before he's even out of high school, as the family historian whose job it is to extract context from the parents on Emilio's behalf. By 2022 the relationship is operational: in 2022 09 13 drive thru weed Yahir formalizes "establish once a week talk with Emilio (weekdays)", and in 2022 06 04 one time things habits he confesses that depending on "Yermy" for plans is one of his bad habits — though as the meta-summary notes, the dependency reads more like closeness-of-bond than actual flaw.

The artifact stack is small but consistent. The Ahmad-Jamal-stream junk drawer (2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream) carries "finish Emilio's letters" and a "frontier pass" trip-pitch — Yahir actively writing to him and pitching shared travel. In 2024 08 14 travel occurrences Emilio is the partner on the Petra off-trail incident: "Accidentally going off-trail at Petra with Emilio and having to scale down a mountain." That single line is one of the densest brother-bond images in the corpus — they make the same kind of dumb decisions together. The Christmas Eve 2022 note (2022 12 25 christmas eve 2022) shows him as the brother who "leaves crying with anger" during the dad-psychosis episode — the one whose pain Yahir feels most sharply, and whose departure is what registers as the family wound.

The pattern across the four years of evidence: Yahir treats Emilio as both a future-recipient (knowledge to preserve) and a present-collaborator (weekly calls, letters, trips). Unlike Valeria, who shows up as the front-line defender, Emilio shows up as the inheritor — the one Yahir wants to make sure has the maps when he needs them. This is the same shape as his self-appointed role with the broader yahir family and, arguably, the same shape as the eventual "be a project youth plus donor" aspiration (2025 05 30 todos) — paying the debt forward, but starting at home with his brother.
